mapper.select:
SELECT b.*, m.nickname AS member_nickname FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{search.size} OFFSET #{search.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board ( id BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, content TEXT NOT NULL, view_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, member_id BIGINT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME(6), updated_at DATETIME(6), PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT FK_board_member FOREIGN KEY (member_id) REFERENCES member (id) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
ALTER TABLE board ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_board_view_count (view_count)
mapper.select: SELECT TABLE_NAME AS tableName, INDEX_NAME AS indexName, COLUMN_NAME AS columnName, NON_UNIQUE AS nonUnique, SEQ_IN_INDEX AS seqInIndex FROM information_schema.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'exam_board' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, SEQ_IN_INDEX
SELECT TABLE_NAME AS viewName, VIEW_DEFINITION AS viewDefinition, IS_UPDATABLE AS isUpdatable FROM information_schema.VIEWS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'exam_board'
